response.justification: Bogdan is a competent generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify, demonstrating solid full-stack and distributed systems work. However, his resume shows no meaningful exposure to the core competencies this Principal IC6 role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, growth measurement, or statistical analysis. The role requires deep specialization in these areas, not just general engineering breadth, and there is no evidence he has built or owned systems of that specific type at any point in his career.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive engineering experience including staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify, demonstrating sustained technical growth
Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second, indicating production-scale competence
Polyglot engineer comfortable with TypeScript, JavaScript, C, C++, C#, and Java, matching the required language stack
concerns: Zero visible experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation — the central mandate of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipeline, or statistical/experimental analysis work evident anywhere in the resume
Resume trajectory is that of a generalist full-stack craftsman, not a growth or measurement platform specialist; the leap to Principal IC6 in this domain is unsupported

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
Scale experience at Stripe and Shopify
